# Security Policy

## Supported Versions
Only the latest version of Vadeus Testnet is supported for security updates.

## Reporting a Vulnerability
We take the security of Vadeus Network seriously. If you find a vulnerability, please do not open a public issue. Instead, send an email to **security@vadeus.network**.

We offer a Bug Bounty program for critical vulnerabilities found in the Staking Logic or Gateway Integration.
